source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 1 org with SLE tissue specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline may also surface the AMP-LN (Accelerating Medicines Partnership Lupus Nephritis) consortium — that is a valid but controlled-access find. Academic rheumatology cohorts (GLADEL, LuNa) are valid finds if they offer physical specimen re-access.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

CHTN Eastern.note: Established academic tissue network — good contact, limited lupus-specific clinical annotation

NDRI.note: Nonprofit tissue procurement — good contact, ISN/RPS class unlikely tracked

Shlok Superspecialty Care.note: Limited public footprint — generic AminoChain contact, no published literature

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: ISN/RPS classification requires expert nephropathology review — not tracked in any biospecimen registry
serological biomarkers not tracked in tissue specimen registries — requires clinical record linkage
serological biomarkers not tracked in tissue specimen registries — requires clinical record linkage
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs OR surfaces a credible academic SLE nephritis cohort

checks: no invented ISN/RPS classifications without a nephropathology source
no invented ANA or anti-dsDNA values without clinical record citation
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for collection protocol specifics
